benchmark_results.note: mean regressed, but median improved from 107.590 us to 107.312 us

change.lever: Short-circuit execute_ready_wave when the ready wave contains exactly one equation, avoiding tensor-work cost calculation and rayon gate checks when parallelism is impossible.

isomorphism_proof.ordering_preserved: yes; singleton ready waves execute the same one equation and mutate env/executed/remaining in the same order as the old serial branch.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking_unchanged: yes; no scheduling choice is introduced because a singleton wave has no competing ready equation.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: identical; primitive evaluation is unchanged and the same equation is evaluated once.
isomorphism_proof.rng: N/A; scheduler path has no random inputs or seeds.
isomorphism_proof.outputs: unchanged; dependency_scheduler_executes_long_chain_with_dependency_counts still returns input plus chain length and max_ready_wave remains 1.
